technologies.Python: Python is my primary programming language. I have hands-on experience with frameworks such as FastAPI, Django, Flask, and Streamlit. I also worked with PyTorch for machine learning projects. Most of my projects are built in Python, including my professional experience as a Python developer.
technologies.Web Development: My professional experience in web development is mainly based on Python frameworks. In personal projects, I work with JavaScript, React, HTML, and CSS. I also have experience using Node.js in selected projects.
technologies.DevOps: I have experience with various DevOps tools and technologies, primarily from professional work. I also explored tools like Terraform independently. I worked with databases for web applications, RAG systems, and caching solutions.
technologies.Other Technologies: In addition to my core stack, I worked with Java (Spring Boot), C# (.NET), and C/C++. Java and Spring Boot were mainly used in academic and project work, while C# was used in personal projects. I continuously explore new technologies and expand my skill set.
